chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-1350 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 24.04.2025 Mr. Shahid Ahmed Shaikh, Addl. P.G. Counsel for the applicant called absent due to lawyers’ strike. However, learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh informs this Court that the case was sent to trial where present Applicant/accused was acquitted of all the charges. Learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh states that he has confirmed this factual position from the Trial Court. In such circumstances, since the Applicant/accused has been acquitted of charges his present Bail Application has become infructuous and hence dismissed. J U D G E Ali Haider
